description: Capability set granted to the main window. Slice T2 shipped the core baseline. Slice T4 added dialog:allow-open + fs:allow-read-text-file for native file open. Slice T5 added dialog:allow-save + fs:allow-write-text-file for native file save. Slice T6 layers path:allow-app-data-dir + fs:allow-mkdir / fs:allow-remove / fs:allow-read-dir so the filesystem autosave can manage <appDataDir>/autosaves/. Slice T7 will add menu/window permissions for the native menu wiring.
